title: potentilla glandulosa subsp. glabrata
intro: Potentilla glandulosa subsp. glabrata, also known as the smooth cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, smooth cinquefoil is often used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine for its therapeutic properties.
